title: chamaecrista lineata var. jamaicensis
intro: Chamaecrista lineata var. jamaicensis, also known as Jamaican buttonweed, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jamaican buttonweed include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Jamaican buttonweed can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies in various forms, including tinctures and salves.
